backend/main.mo: Main actor for the portfolio backend, managing artworks, user profiles, site images (logo, cover, portrait), and media contacts with role-based access control via authorization and blob-storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (artworks with raw [Nat8] images) into the new schema (artworks with optional ExternalBlob images), dropping legacy image bytes during migration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking three bug-fix features (contacts update error, image upload failures, and mutation hook audit) to their affected files and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, and page in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio' and mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /admin-login, /admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component that fetches and displays the artist portrait, name, bio, and static stats grid with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Displays a responsive grid gallery of artworks fetched from the API, with skeleton loading states, an empty state, and a lightbox dialog for viewing selected artwork details.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with cards for WhatsApp, Instagram, and location info fetched dynamically via useMediaContacts, plus a static map embed and consultation prompt.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Renders a list of five static featured projects using ProjectSection components, enriching each with a dynamic location pulled from fetched artworks data by title or index.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick-link scroll buttons, static contact details, and a hidden triple-tap logo gesture that navigates to the admin route.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying a dynamic cover image, artist name, tagline, and stats fetched from the API, with a WhatsApp CTA button and scroll-down chevron.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, active section highlighting, smooth-scroll links, a mobile menu, and a hidden triple-tap logo shortcut to the admin route.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: A reusable React component that renders a single project entry with an image panel and a text panel side-by-side, supporting optional reversed layout, location badge, and numbered label.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: A section component that displays an Instagram QR code image and a follow button, fetching the Instagram profile URL from the backend via the useMediaContacts hook.
Renders a dark-themed services grid section listing six offered services (murals, commercial art, painting, texture, restoration, illustration) with icons, numbered labels, and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays a 'Why Choose Me' section with a 3-column grid of six trust-point cards, each featuring an icon, title, description, and decorative number watermark.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for reading and mutating backend data (artworks, logo, cover image, artist portrait, media contacts, text content), wrapping the ICP actor calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: A hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view by listening to scroll events and comparing element offsets against the current scroll position plus an offset.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm artisanal OKLCH color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/lib/adminAuth.ts: Stub admin authentication module that bypasses all auth checks by always returning true for isAuthenticated and providing no-op session management functions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: AdminLogin page component that immediately redirects to the /admin route on mount, rendering nothing itself.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page with tabs for managing artworks, media contacts, and site images (logo/cover/portrait), using React Query mutation hooks for CRUD operations and toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/pages/PortfolioPage.tsx: Main portfolio page component that composes all section components (Navigation, Hero, About, Services, Gallery, Contact, etc.) into a single full-page layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), semantic color tokens mapped to CSS variables, and a brand palette (terracotta, gold, cream, charcoal) using OKLCH values.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking existing features, known issues, and pending fix requests related to admin panel contact update failures and image upload bugs in the frontend mutation hooks and backend actor.
